seoTitle: Rainbow Beach vs Rangemore — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Rainbow Beach and Rangemore. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Rainbow Beach vs Rangemore: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rainbow Beach and Rangemore.
heading: Rainbow Beach vs Rangemore — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rainbow Beach, Queensland and Rangemore, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rangemore has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Rainbow Beach (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rainbow Beach or Rangemore safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rainbow Beach has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Rangemore scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rainbow Beach scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Rangemore scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rainbow Beach or Rangemore?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rangemore has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
